title: Crispy Malaysian Navy Beans Skewers
description: A festive dish featuring grilled dried white navy beans with a tangy glaze for a high-protein-friendly snack.
instructions: Soak the dried navy beans in water for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the beans. Add them to a pot with enough water to cover and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, partially cover, and simmer until the beans are tender (about 1 hour).
Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Gently mix the drained soy sauce, lemon juice, and sugar in a small bowl. Taste for desired tartness and adjust if needed.
Slice the soaked beans lengthwise into sticks about 2 cm wide.
Brush each bean slice with the glaze mixture, making sure they are evenly coated.
Thread the glazed navy beans onto skewers, leaving space between each to ensure even cooking.
Grill for about 5-10 minutes or until the outer layer is crispy and golden brown. Flip occasionally for even cooking.
Serve hot as a snack with friends.
